about.title: Our Brand Story
about.desc: Lowlands Coffee was born out of an infinite love for Vietnamese coffee beans. Unlike the high mountain peaks, 'Lowlands' represents the fertile valleys and plains where heaven and earth intersect, a gathering place for life and connection. We bring Robusta and Arabica beans from the red soils of the Central Highlands to major cities, preserving the traditional phin brewing method while elevating it with a modern service experience in a warm, minimalist space.

card1.title: 100% Robusta & Arabica
card1.desc: Coffee beans are hand-harvested ripe red in the basalt soil of Lam Dong.
card1.backDesc: Each bold Robusta and light Arabica bean is purchased directly from farmers, going through a strict screening process and roasting according to an exclusive formula to preserve the essence of the aroma.

card2.title: Traditional Phin Brewing
card2.desc: Each cup of coffee is filtered from traditional phin, retaining the full Vietnamese flavor.
card2.backDesc: Retaining the traditional flavor of the aluminum phin - the immortal symbol of Vietnamese coffee. Slowly extracting, each drop leaves a bold bitter taste with a sweet, charming aftertaste.

card3.title: Connecting Space
card3.desc: Rustic design, close to nature, strengthening the relationships of the Vietnamese community.
card3.backDesc: Not just selling coffee, Lowlands brings a cozy and sophisticated destination to study, chat, or meet. A place connecting like-minded souls amidst the busy urban life.

loyalty.title:
Lowlands Club Membership 
Earn Coffee Beans, Get Rewards
loyalty.desc: Become a Lowlands Club member today to enjoy premium privileges. Accumulate Coffee Beans with every purchase of your favorite drinks and redeem them for exclusive brand items, free beverages, and personalized offers.
loyalty.step1Desc: Sign up for membership in just 30 seconds and receive a 20% off voucher for your first order.
loyalty.step2Desc: For every 10,000đ spent at any store or when ordering online, you immediately earn 1 Coffee Bean.
loyalty.step3Desc: Redeem your coffee beans for free drinks, hot pastries, or exclusive brand merchandise.

aboutPage.title: About Lowlands Coffee
aboutPage.subtitle: Connecting traditional phin coffee culture with modern urban life.
aboutPage.joinDesc: We are always looking for passionate, coffee-loving individuals who want to spread the Vietnamese coffee heritage.

t2021.title: The Spark of an Idea
t2021.desc: Lowlands Coffee was sparked from a love of simple phin coffee and a desire to bring the flavors of the Central Highlands to the city streets.

t2022.title: The First Store
t2022.desc: Opened the first branch at Turtle Lake, District 3, HCMC - creating a cozy connection space for young people.

t2024.title: Expansion Journey
t2024.desc: Reached 30 stores in HCMC, Hanoi, and Da Nang, while establishing a direct supply chain from farming households.

t2026.title: Modern Transformation
t2026.desc: Launched a convenient App ordering system and smart POS counters, elevating the overall customer experience.

v1.title: Original Quality
v1.desc: Committed to using hand-picked ripe Robusta and Arabica beans, roasted purely with no additives.

v2.title: Modern Experience
v2.desc: Leveraging technology for quick ordering and payments while keeping the phin culture intact.

v3.title: Farmer Responsibility
v3.desc: Purchasing directly at premium rates to improve the livelihood of local farming families.

v4.title: Community Connection
v4.desc: Every store serves as a warm local hub, sharing joy and positive energy daily.

f1.q: How to order online on Lowlands Coffee website?
f1.a: Simply go to the 'Menu' page, select your favorite drinks with your preferred size and toppings, click 'Add to Cart'. Then, access your 'Cart' in the top right corner, fill in shipping details, choose a payment method, and complete the order.

f2.q: What is the average delivery time of Lowlands?
f2.a: The average delivery time is 15 to 35 minutes depending on the distance from the nearest Lowlands branch to your address. In case of weather issues or high demand, customer support will proactively contact you.

f3.q: How do I accumulate membership points?
f3.a: When ordering online on the website/app while logged in, the system automatically awards points (rate: 10,000đ = 1 point). For in-store orders, simply provide your registered phone number to the cashier.

f4.q: Can I cancel or edit my order details after placing it?
f4.a: To ensure drinks are served hot/cold as quickly as possible, orders are prepared immediately upon confirmation. To edit details or cancel, please call CSKH Hotline 1900 xxxx within 3 minutes of ordering.

f5.q: What payment methods does Lowlands support?
f5.a: We support multiple payment methods including: Cash on Delivery (COD), dynamic QR code bank transfers, and linked e-wallets like Momo and ZaloPay.
